name: Aged Tofu (Figi)
recipeIngredient: 2 packages of firm tofu, 10.5 oz each
2 ounces soy sauce or tamari sauce
1/3 tsp fish stock or vegetable stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the tofu dry with paper towels.
2. Cut each package of tofu in half, then cut each half into four equal portions.
3. Flour each portion lightly.
4. Heat vegetable oil to medium-hot (350 to 375°F).
5. Add the tofu a few at a time and fry until golden brown on all sides.
6. Remove the tofu with tongs and drain on paper towels.
7. Prepare the sauce by combining water, soy or tamari sauce, sugar, and stock in a saucepan.
8. Bring to a boil and stir well to ensure the sugar dissolves completely.
9. To serve, place a small amount of the sauce on four warmed plates.
10. Divide the tofu evenly among the plates and place them on the sauce.
11. Garnish with grated ginger and chopped scallions.
